creator: rea-fbsd@codelabs.ru
text:
MoinMoin 1.6.2 has a known security vulnerability,
  http://www.FreeBSD.org/ports/portaudit/c4ba95b2-39ce-11dd-98c9-00163e000016.htm
And MoinMoin 1.6.3 is out:
  http://moinmo.in/MoinMoinDownload

Fix: The following patch updates our port to 1.6.3.  It had received
the limited testing on the MM instances I have at hand.
How-To-Repeat: 
Look at the above URLs.
